name: file-next
description: File-system components for Next.js — file browser, uploader, actions, and supporting primitives built on @file-next/headless.
author: file-next contributors <hello@file-next.dev>

items.name: file-browser
items.title: File Browser
items.description: List files with keyboard navigation, loading and error states. Built on useFileBrowser from @file-next/headless.

items.name: file-uploader
items.title: File Uploader
items.description: Dropzone + button with keyboard support, real progress and cancel. Built on useUploader from @file-next/headless.

items.name: file-actions
items.title: File Actions
items.description: Delete / move / copy menu with optimistic update + rollback. Built on useFileActions from @file-next/headless.

items.name: breadcrumbs
items.title: File Breadcrumbs
items.description: Folder path segments with click-to-navigate. Keyboard accessible.

items.name: file-preview
items.title: File Preview
items.description: Image preview for image mime types; lucide icon for everything else.

items.name: empty-state
items.title: File Empty State
items.description: Placeholder shown when a folder has no children. Built on shadcn Empty.

items.name: error-state
items.title: File Error State
items.description: Error banner shown when list / upload fails. Built on shadcn Alert.
